features: Beautifully wrapped and ready to pop under the tree, indulge in all your bath time essentials for the perfect pamper night
Contains a 300ml crème bath bubbles and 300ml shower crème to gently cleanse and fragrance the skin
The 50ml hand & nail cream is perfect to nourish your skin, whilst the scented candle help set a peaceful bathroom ambience
Floral keepsake box with recyclable cardboard wrap band
description: Product Description Beautifully wrapped and ready to pop under the tree, indulge in all your bath time essentials for the perfect pamper night. This set includes 300ml crème bath bubbles, 300ml shower crème, 50ml hand & nail cream and 60g scented candle. Influenced by catwalk, interior and lifestyle trends, this year’s design partners a beautifully executed tropical floral print with luxe foils for femininity with a modern twist. A seductive colour palette of fuscia pink and teal green are elevated against a rich velvety grey back drop to give this collection the luxury edge perfect for any floral loving fashionista. The Boudoire Collection is our most feminine and indulgent collection. This Tropical Paradise with top notes of banana, peach and orange blossom is delicate yet indulgent, modern, and sumptuous. Ingredients BATH BUBBLES: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4. SHOWER CREME: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4.HAND & NAIL CREAMS: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Benzaldehyde. Directions Crème Bath Bubbles - Pour Into Bath Under Warm Running Water. Shower Creme - Lather And Rinse. Hand & Nail Cream- Massage Gently Into Skin Until Fully Absorbed. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. Manufacturer Contact Information Baylis & Harding Plc, B98 7AS, England. RP. MSL, Suite 5385, 27 Upper Pembroke St, Dublin, IE. See more
